---
name: generate-knowledge-bank
description: Bootstrap a repository knowledge bank from repository evidence.
---

# Use case
Use when the repository does not yet have a complete knowledge bank.

# Workflow
1. Follow shared knowledge-bank rules.
2. Read knowledge-bank config.
3. Read all knowledge templates.
4. Discover the repository.
5. Create all required knowledge files.
6. Record uncertainties in open-questions.md.

# Bootstrap behavior
- Create missing files.
- Populate each file using its template.
- Use concise, evidence-based content.
